organizations.name: U.S. Department of Justice
organizations.context: Attorney General has exclusive authority to bring actions; receives semiannual reports

organizations.name: United States Treasury
organizations.context: Establishes separate account for Digital Social Platform Terms of Service Fund

offices.name: Digital Social Platform Terms of Service Fund
offices.context: Separate account established in the Treasury; one-half of administrative assessment funds deposited

roles.title: Attorney General
roles.context: electronically submit to the Attorney General a terms of service report

legislation_refs.name: Digital Social Platform Transparency Act
legislation_refs.context: This Act may be cited as the "Digital Social Platform Transparency Act".

legislation_refs.name: section 706 of title 5, United States Code
legislation_refs.context: Notwithstanding section 706 of title 5, United States Code, Attorney General may make interpretations

named_docs.name: terms of service report
named_docs.context: each digital social company shall electronically submit to the Attorney General a terms of service report

named_docs.name: searchable repository
named_docs.context: The Attorney General shall make all terms of service reports submitted pursuant to this section available to the public in a searchable repository on its official internet website

named_docs.name: Digital Social Platform Terms of Service Fund
named_docs.context: Separate account established to maintain reporting website and support enforcement

disambiguation_rules.attorney general: Resolved as head of U.S. Department of Justice based on standard federal structure; context: recipient of semiannual reports on digital social platform terms of service and content moderation practices
